LightningComponentBundle.description: B2B Commerce storefront case detail view. Reads the caseId URL param and shows owner/account/status/priority, dates, closed reason, last comment, subject and description for a single Case scoped to the logged-in user's account.

property.name: heading
property.label: Heading
property.description: Eyebrow label shown above the case number.

property.name: backPageApiName
property.label: Case list page API name
property.description: API name of the community page hosting the case list. Used by the 'Back to cases' link. Leave blank to use browser back.
